tasks.description: Create VERSION files (src/VERSION and top-level VERSION) containing semver string 0.1.0
Add portable checksum function, category lookup function, and manifest generation on fresh install to install.sh
Add version-aware --update flow with category-based file handling and changelog summary to install.sh
Update install.sh header comment with platform documentation and usage examples
Add /seed nudge banner to setup.sh (both src/setup.sh and top-level setup.sh, must remain byte-identical)
Add placeholder detection and /seed nudge to session-start.sh (both src/.claude/hooks/session-start.sh and top-level .claude/hooks/session-start.sh, must remain byte-identical)

Fix pipefail bug in session-start.sh: guard the git status pipeline on line 11 so that a non-zero exit from git status does not propagate through pipefail and kill the script under set -e. Append '|| echo 0' or wrap in a subshell. Both src/.claude/hooks/session-start.sh and .claude/hooks/session-start.sh must remain byte-identical after the fix.
